diagrams.title: Geometric Interpretation of Least Squares
diagrams.description: Shows vector b in ℝᵐ, its projection onto column space Col(A), and the residual vector orthogonal to the subspace
elements: Projection p = Ax̂ (closest point in subspace)
Residual r = b - p (perpendicular to subspace)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that least squares finds the orthogonal projection, minimizing the distance from b to the subspace

diagrams.title: Normal Equations Derivation Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing derivation from minimization objective to normal equations
elements: Take gradient and set to zero
diagrams.purpose: Understand mathematical derivation path of normal equations

diagrams.title: QR Decomposition Solution Path
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of solving least squares using QR decomposition
elements: Solve R x = c by back-substitution
diagrams.purpose: Follow computational pipeline for QR-based least squares solution

diagrams.title: SVD-based Least Squares
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how singular values are used to compute solution
elements: Non-zero singular values → reciprocals, zeros stay zeros
diagrams.purpose: Understand how SVD handles singular/ill-conditioned matrices
